name: Broadcom Inc.
description: Broadcom Inc. is a global technology leader that designs, develops, and supplies a broad range of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions. The company's category-leading product portfolio serves critical markets including data center, networking, enterprise software, broadband, wireless, storage, and industrial. Broadcom's solutions include data center networking and storage, enterprise, mainframe, and cyber security software focused on automation, monitoring and security, smartphone components, telecoms, and factory automation. The company is a key player in the AI infrastructure space, providing custom AI accelerators and high-performance networking solutions.
